base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of oneup_mushroom_static — a pickup_item (power_item) from 1985 super mario bros. Green 1-Up mushroom, static sprite. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Green 1-Up mushroom, static sprite; rare spawn from select hidden blocks; grants extra life on contact
